question.content: In the glass-hemisphere imaging system described, the two visible images of the luminous strip just touch end to end. Find the distance from the far end A_1 of the strip to the center O of the hemisphere. Answer format: a single numerical value or algebraic expression; do not include units, explanatory text, or an equals sign.

step_1.content: Build axial imaging relations for the hemispherical glass body and two visible weak image branches.
step_1.key_point: Head-to-tail touching of two images provides the closure condition.

step_3.content: Substitute given A2 location and source length to solve A1 distance from O.
